name: flag-3
description: suppress column 3 (lines that appear in both files)

name: check-order
description: check that the input is correctly sorted, even if all input lines are pairable --nocheck-order do not check that the input is correctly sorted --output-delimiter=STR separate columns with STR --total output a summary

name: zero-terminated
description: line delimiter is NUL, not newline --help display this help and exit --version output version information and exit
